name: RecapThisBot
description: $RECAP is a Telegram-based community assistant and analytics platform for crypto projects. It summarizes group discussions, answers questions based on chat history, and helps make community information easier to access for both members and administrators. The platform also provides tools such as real-time translation, activity tracking, sentiment monitoring, and trend detection to support community management and engagement. The project operates on the Solana blockchain and uses the $RECAP token to power platform features, including visibility boosts for projects across the Recap network. By integrating the bot into Telegram communities, projects can organize fast-moving conversations, improve member support, and provide easier access to relevant updates and insights.
